framework.name: Multi-hop intent binding with scope attenuation
framework.description: CAAM addresses the N-hop delegation problem (User→Agent A→Agent B→Agent C) with Scope Attenuation, Depth-Limited Tokens, and Intent-Binding — ensuring delegated authority degrades across hops rather than accumulating. This is a concrete technical approach to the confused deputy problem in agent chains.
framework.raw_quote: CAAM provides Scope Attenuation, Depth-Limited Tokens, and Intent-Binding to ensure that delegated authority degrades gracefully rather than accumulating across hops
